title: Senior Node.js Developer
post: We are looking for a skilled Senior Node.js Developer to build and manage a notification system where users will receive notifications and apply through the platform. The developer will be responsible for designing backend services, APIs, and ensuring high performance and scalability of the system.  You will work on creating a real-time notification engine, integrating user application flow, and maintaining secure and efficient server-side logic.
description:
Develop and maintain backend services using Node.js
Build a scalable notification system (push/email/SMS or in-app)
Create and manage RESTful APIs
Handle user application flow (apply system)
Database design and optimization (MongoDB/MySQL)
Ensure security, performance, and scalability
Debug and fix production issues
Collaborate with frontend and product team
skills: Strong knowledge of Node.js & Express.js Experience with MongoDB / MySQL Understanding of REST APIs Knowledge of real-time systems (WebSocket / Socket.io) Basic understanding of authentication (JWT, OAuth) Experience in building notification systems Good problem-solving skills Git & version control
